examples: Every province, autonomous region and municipality has set up a census office and will report to a main center staffed by officials from government departments.
Aydin Municipality bought the plane from a private company for just under US$100,000, but they hope to see a return on that investment through the tourism industry.
Our municipality is divided into ten districts.
Wiry, sociable, in his early thirties, he worked as an ecology officer for the municipality.
The chief is faced with murder, a menacing militia and a municipality loaded with soap-opera-like misbehavior.
